## Product Vision

[3–5 paragraph narrative describing the product's purpose, the world it lives in, and why it matters. Written for a human reader — this is not a specification. Write in active present tense.]

---

## Emotional Register

**Primary emotion:** [One word: calm / energised / curious / trustworthy / playful / …]
**Tone:** [2–4 adjectives that capture the experience]
**What it should NOT feel like:** [1–2 anti-tones that the product must avoid]

3. **[Theme Name]:** [Description]

| Reference | Why It Fits |
|-----------|------------|

| [Name + URL/description] | [What visual or emotional quality to borrow] |
